Sway_Type_Description: A Proficiency is a unit of knowledge. It may be a single memory, or it might have come from years of dedicated research or training. Proficiencies can really, describe anything. Even Annexes built from multiple Proficiencies will also have a single Proficiency in their use.
A Skill based Annex, made from two Proficiencies combining two Facets aspects and Values.

A Talent based Annex, made from at least three Proficiencies, a Root Prof, Channel Prof and an Umbral Prof with optional Nimbed Profs. Each Umbral in a Talent may Support at least 1 Nimbed. Nimbeds and Umbrals interact with the Tangle.

A Power based Annex or Descendant, made from a minimum of three Proficiencies, a Root Prof, Channel Prof and a number of Umbral Profs with optional Nimbed Profs. Each Umbral in a Power may Support multiple Nimbeds. Umbrals and Nimbeds interact with the Tangle.

Personality Annexes are the Master Annex of all Characters more important than Extras. Personality Annexes grant Characters ways of gaining Chi from their Persona and other abilities from their Core and (Resolved) Hitches.
A Super-Annex based Annex, made from at least two Proficiencies
Size Annexes are the Master Annex of a Location Descendant (or a Kaiju Monster).
Pact Annexes are the Master Annex of a Pact Descendant and is governed the most powerful member, the total number of members and the type of Pact.
